concept: Architect a strategy game where players command a civilization living within a colossal organism's circulatory system, building settlements at crucial junctions and managing relationships with other internal civilizations. Resource collection involves harvesting materials from passing nutrient flows while avoiding harmful pathogens and maintaining the health of your host environment. Technology development focuses on symbiotic adaptations that benefit both your civilization and the host organism, creating mutual evolutionary advantages. Diplomatic tensions arise when different internal civilizations compete for limited resources or follow development paths that harm the shared environment. The campaign's ultimate challenge involves uniting all internal factions to heal the host organism from a catastrophic disease that threatens all internal civilizations equally.
